holy-light.description: Release focused divine light at a single enemy, striking them with Holy force.

wild-charge.description: Leap forward with ferocious momentum, crushing enemies and fueling your Rage.

fan-fire.description: Rapidly unload a burst of shots into one target, building momentum for follow-up fire.

fireball.description: Launch a fiery orb that explodes on impact, burning enemies and leaving a Firewall behind.

summon-skeleton.description: Raise a Skeleton Soldier to fight beside you as the backbone of your undead army.

grand-cross.description: Burst forth a radiant cross along the ground, purging a wide area of the unworthy with your holy righteousness!

sanctuary.description: Raise a sacred tree that heals allies and repels undead with holy radiance.

shadow-step.description: Step through shadow to appear behind the target and strike.

strafing-volley.description: Fire a rapid volley of arrows into a single target.

shadow-seal.description: Split your presence through shadow, creating clones to fight alongside you.

summon-cat.description: Summon a nimble caster that darts through battle and blasts enemies with lightning.

bash.description: Smash the target with a crushing blow, with a chance to stun them.

meteor.description: Call down a burning meteor, stunning enemies and leaving them scorched in the blast.

execute.description: Deliver a brutal finishing blow, dealing heavy damage and feeding your Rage.

heal.description: Channel holy energy into an ally, restoring HP and leaving gentle Regeneration behind.

panic-burst.description: Unleash a sudden burst of pistol fire, damaging nearby enemies and finishing prepared combos.

bone-spikes.description: Rupture the ground with jagged bone spikes, impaling enemies caught above them.

exorcism.description: Call down sacred radiance over an area, pulling enemies inward before blasting them with holy power.

venom-strike.description: Strike twice with venomous force, with a chance to apply Poison.

flame-orb.description: Send out a slow orb of unstable flame that erupts into a wide explosion on impact.

soul-strike.description: Launch a focused burst of Soul magic at a single enemy.

firebolt.description: Launch a concentrated bolt of Fire at one enemy and attune yourself to Fire.

ice-shard.description: This spell is a great ice breaker as you send an ice spike that shatters and freezes your foes.

chain-lightning.description: Unleash lightning that jumps between enemies, shocking each target it chains through.

cloaking.description: Blend into shifting shadows, hiding from sight until you attack, cast, or take a hit.

fire-pillar.description: Summon a pillar of flame from the ground, burning enemies and exposing them to Earth.

tempest.description: Summon a furious gale that batters enemies, blinds them, and exposes them to Water damage.

whirlwind.description: A living funnel of air, whipping up storms and tossing its prey around like leaves.

berserk.description: Enter a reckless battle state, greatly increasing combat power while abandoning restraint.

arcane-sigil.description: Mystic wards glow beneath a polished jeweled crest.

stomp.description: Slam the ground with heavy force, stunning enemies caught in the impact.

earth-spikes.description: Rupture the ground with jagged stone, striking enemies and leaving them exposed to Fire.

thunder-storm.description: Call down a storm of lightning over an area, striking enemies and exposing them to Water damage.

hydro-vortex.description: Unleash a violent spiral of water, dragging enemies inward and exposing them to Wind.

fury-bond.description: Bind an ally with volatile force, granting Fury and Might through a shared battle surge.

ice-release.description: Call forth a spectral pufferfish that fires icy shards, slowing foes and readying your next spell.

thunderbolt.description: Call down a focused bolt of lightning on one enemy and attune yourself to Wind.

earthbolt.description: Strike a single foe with crushing Earth magic and attune yourself to Earth.

shield-bash.description: Charge! Brace that shield and lunge forth. Crumbling enemy defenses and opening them for further attacks.

icebolt.description: Ice to meet you! As you hurl a Water shard at your foes.

axe-mastery.description: Increases attack with axes, swords, and scythes, and raises critical chance.

blade-mastery.description: Increases attack with daggers, swords, twinblades, and katars, while improving Attack Speed.

codex-mastery.description: Increases Magic Attack with books, staffs, and maces, while improving Healing.

honed-blade.description: Increases the damage dealt by critical hits.

dual-wield-mastery.description: Allows you to wield a weapon in each hand.

faith.description: Increases damage against Undead and Shadow enemies, while reducing damage taken from them.

fortify.description: Increases maximum HP, Vitality, and Healing Received.

free-cast.description: Allows movement and attacks while casting, with reduced Move Speed and Attack Speed.

gun-mastery.description: Increases attack with firearms, improves Attack Speed, and allows dual wielding pistols.

mace-mastery.description: Increases attack with maces, books, and staffs, while improving Attack Speed.

multistrike.description: Gives auto attacks a chance to strike additional times.

ninjutsu-mastery.description: Increases cast range, Magic Attack, maximum MP, and MP recovery.

precise-aim.description: Increases attack range and Hit Rate.

brutality.description: Increases the maximum number of Rage stacks you can build.

reflect-shield.description: Reflects a portion of incoming damage back to attackers.

natural-resistance.description: Reduces damage taken from all elements.

scythe-mastery.description: Increases attack with scythes, axes, and swords, while adding HP siphon.

shadow-mastery.description: Increases Move Speed, Perfect Dodge, and Spell Dodge.

shield-mastery.description: Improves Block Chance and defenses while using a shield.

skeleton-mastery.description: Strengthens summons by increasing their Attack, Magic Attack, and resistance.

spear-mastery.description: Increases attack with spears, swords, and maces, while raising maximum HP.

summon-mastery.description: Allows summoned allies to inherit more of your attributes.

twohand-parry.description: Improves your ability to block while using two-handed weapons.

wand-mastery.description: Increases Magic Attack with staffs, books, and swords, while improving Cast Speed.

weaver-mastery.description: Increases Attack, Magic Attack, all attributes, and lets skills splash nearby enemies.

aegis-of-light.description: Briefly protect yourself and allies by invoking your faith. Praise the light!

aerial-shot.description: Leap through the air and fire downward, striking enemies below before landing with evasive grace.

inner-focus.description: Sharpen your focus and reflexes, increasing AGI and DEX for a short time.

arrow-shower.description: Rain arrows over a wide area, striking enemies repeatedly and forcing them to scatter.

twin-cleave.description: Swing twice in wide arcs, cutting through enemies in front of you.

axe-throw.description: Hurl your axe in a brutal arc, striking the target before it snaps back into your grasp.

vortex-slash.description: Unleash a spinning slash that damages nearby enemies and pulls them toward you.

sacred-aegis.description: Wrap an ally in divine protection, forming a barrier based on their maximum health.

blade-dance.description: Unleash a flurry of strikes around you, cutting down nearby enemies in rapid motion.

benediction.description: Bless nearby allies with divine protection, raising all attributes for a short time.

blink.description: Teleport to a target location, slipping out of danger and repositioning with precision.

blood-crash.description: Spend stored Rage to recover health instantly and keep regenerating for a short time.

blood-frenzy.description: Give in to relentless violence, trading control for speed, pressure, and sustain.

bone-spear.description: Hurl a sharpened lance of bone that pierces through flesh and spirit alike.

conjurer.description: Deepen your bond with summoned allies, improving summon damage and healing power.

consecration.description: Drop a pillar of light that purifies the surrounding area, burning the unworthy and healing the righteous.

conviction-aura.description: Radiate unwavering resolve, increasing nearby allies' Melee, Ranged, and Magic damage.

corpse-barrier.description: Bind stolen bone and life into a grim barrier, shielding yourself through your summon.

corpse-explosion.description: Detonate a skeleton summon in a burst of necrotic force, causing nearby enemies and summons to explode on death.

counter-stance.description: Raise your guard and counter. Blocks attacks and hits back with a stunning blow!

cure.description: Purify an ally with holy clarity, protecting them from Poison, Blind, and Silence.

cyclone.description: Spin forward in a violent cyclone, pulling enemies inward and shredding them with repeated strikes.

damnation.description: Call down holy judgment, damaging enemies and leaving them exposed to both physical and Magic punishment.

dark-claw.description: Rip into the target with savage slashes, causing Bleeding while fueling your Rage.

death-bond.description: Bind yourself to an ally, sharing healing and HP siphon between both bonded souls.

necrotic-presence.description: The summon radiates necrotic power, empowering nearby allies' Undead damage while weakening enemies.

death-coil.description: Unleash a coil of undead energy, harming enemies while restoring summoned allies.

death-nova.description: Release a burst of necrotic force, rotting nearby enemies and leaving a decaying field behind.

death-spiral.description: Spin into a scythe assault, carving nearby enemies while spreading Decay through each strike.

defiance-aura.description: Radiate unyielding faith, reducing incoming damage for nearby allies.

absolution.description: Strip the target clean of buffs and harmful statuses, returning them to a neutral state.

divine-punishment.description: Channel your divine might and rain down radiant swords on your unworthy foes!

divinity.description: Radiate divine power, strengthening nearby allies while empowering your own healing and holy protection.

avatar-of-stone.description: Mastery over earth lets you assume this avatar state. Increasing earth damage, while making you more resistant to attacks.

earth-wall.description: Raise a wall of solid stone, blocking space and shaping the battlefield around you.

earthquake.description: Shake the battlefield with violent tremors, stunning enemies caught in the upheaval.

sanctify.description: Bless an ally's armor with holy light, changing their armor element to Holy.

enchant-poison.description: Imbue your attacks with the Poison element.

endow-holy.description: Bless an ally's weapon with holy light, converting them to the Holy element.

endure.description: Steel yourself against incoming hits, increasing defenses and preventing flinching.

energy-shield.description: Wrap yourself in arcane protection, redirecting part of incoming damage to MP.

explosive-grenade.description: Hurl an explosive charge that detonates in flames, knocking back and burning enemies.

fan-of-knives.description: Scatter a fan of spectral blades, leaping through danger while setting up your next technique.

fanaticism.description: Radiate holy zeal, quickening nearby allies while making your own strikes more relentless.

banishment-field.description: Call down a cursed field that twists healing against enemies and leaves them exposed to Magic damage.

dissonance-well.description: Create a dissonant field that damages enemies and slows their movement, attacks, and casting.

resonance-well.description: Create a soothing well of resonance, healing allies who remain within its gentle hum.

suppression-field.description: Create a silent field that pulls enemies inward and may seal their ability to cast.

avatar-of-fire.description: Mastery over Fire lets you assume this avatar state. Increasing Fire damage, Healing Received, and igniting those that dare attack you.

fire-release.description: Call forth a blazing spirit that crashes down in flames and leaves your attacks wreathed in Fire.

flash-bang.description: Backslide out of danger and prepare a flash grenade for your next move.

flow-state.description: Enter a focused combat rhythm, turning auto attacks into Magic pressure and improving autocast flow.

force-shot.description: Fire a powerful shot that knocks enemies back and sets up a combo finisher.

freeze-grenade.description: Throw a freezing charge that bursts in an area, immobilizing enemies caught inside.

blizzard.description: Unleash a barrage of hail, knocking back foes with the might of ice. A slick spell to keep enemies away.

binding-spiral.description: Spin with collapsing force, dragging enemies inward before freezing those caught at the center.

divine-grace.description: Bless nearby allies with divine grace, greatly improving natural HP and MP recovery.

grave-chill.description: The summon radiates graveborn cold, hastening nearby allies while chilling nearby enemies.

earth-splitter.description: Slam the ground with heavy force, staggering enemies and setting them up for your next combo.

guardian-bond.description: Bind an ally with guardian magic, granting Vitality and Regeneration through a shared bond.

guardian-spirit.description: Conjure a guardian spirit around an ally, shielding them from ranged attacks.

harvest.description: Leap forward with a wide scythe swing, staggering enemies and opening them to a finishing strike.

haste.description: Bless an ally with swiftness, clearing Slow and increasing Move Speed and Attack Speed.

high-guard.description: Become an impenetrable fortress, increasing Block while becoming difficult to move.

high-heal.description: Pour intense holy power into an ally, restoring a massive amount of HP.

holy-shield.description: May the light bless your shield, increasing Block and All Resistance against all your foes!

holy-wrath.description: Smite an area with concentrated holy power, silencing enemies and leaving wrathful light behind.

invoker.description: Enter an invoker state, empowering your summons to echo Soul Strike with their own Magic.

judgement-blade.description: This giant Holy sword cleaves through the unworthy, slowing them for further attacks.

jump-shot.description: Leap into battle and fire mid-air, staggering enemies and opening them to a follow-up shot.

life-bond.description: Link your life to an ally, taking their wounds upon yourself through a sacred bond.

life-drain.description: Siphon vitality from enemies, or empower a summon with a dangerous undead surge.

lightning-reflexes.description: Move like living lightning, increasing speed and evasive combat instincts.

lightning-release.description: Unleash a phoenix of lightning that streaks forward, piercing enemies in its path.

flash-step.description: Cross the battlefield in an instant, striking the target area with sudden force.

mimic-seal.description: Seal a target's magic and copy its essence, allowing you to cast the spell as your own.

lockdown.description: Lock your heavy weapon in place, unleashing sustained fire while holding your ground.

mark-target.description: Mark a target's weak points, reducing their Flee and Critical Defense.

gryphon-riding.description: Call upon your holy gryphon, taking to the battlefield as both rider and radiant blade.

venom-coating.description: Coat your attacks in venom, giving each strike a chance to apply Poison.

piercing-shot.description: Fire a piercing rifle round that punches through enemies, staggering and knocking them back.

point-blank.description: Fire a brutal close-range shotgun blast, blinding enemies and finishing shotgun combos.

poison-grenade.description: Hurl a toxic grenade that bursts into Poison, leaving deadly ground behind.

reanimation.description: Bind the lingering spirit of a fallen boss, claiming it as an undead champion.

reap.description: Carve through nearby enemies with a merciless scythe strike, pulling them in and siphoning HP.

resurrection.description: Return a fallen ally to life, restoring a portion of their HP and spirit.

salvation.description: Call down celestial light, returning all fallen allies to life with renewed strength.

sacrament.description: Focus holy will into clarity, empowering Holy magic while improving Cast Speed and Status Duration.

sacred-ground.description: Hallow the ground beneath your allies, reducing damage taken from Ground Effects.

sacrifice.description: Offer your own HP to the divine, adding Holy damage to each of your blows.

elusive-feint.description: Slip backward in a shadowy feint, briefly evading all attacks and leaving a clone behind.

black-blade.description: Launch a whirling crescent of darkness that carves through the target with shadow force.

shield-throw.description: Let the light guide your shield as you hurl it between many foes.

shock-absorber.description: Brace behind your shotgun, absorbing heavy impact and preventing flinching.

blood-howl.description: Unleash a savage howl that fills nearby allies with bloodlust and battle hunger.

furious-shout.description: Let out a furious battle cry, granting nearby allies Fury and sharpening their critical strikes.

mighty-roar.description: Let out a mighty roar, empowering nearby allies with increased strength.

fearsome-cry.description: Terrify nearby enemies with a savage cry, stunning them while fueling your Rage.

shrapnel.description: Blast enemies with close-range shrapnel, slowing and bleeding those caught in the burst.

shuriken-fan.description: Hurl a spinning shuriken that lingers in place, slicing nearby enemies again and again.

silent-edge.description: Enter a precise killing stance, increasing critical chance and Critical Damage.

slow-trap.description: Spread a shadowy trap across the ground, slowing enemies and leaving them vulnerable.

smite.description: Strike the target with holy force, dealing blessed damage with a chance to stun.

smoke-screen.description: Create a blinding smoke screen, blinding enemies while cloaking yourself.

sniper's-nest.description: Take a steady sniper stance, increasing Ranged damage and Critical Damage while greatly reducing movement.

sniper-shot.description: Line up a devastating rifle shot, striking with heavy precision damage.

soul-drain.description: The summon radiates a draining aura, helping nearby allies siphon HP and MP from battle.

spear-quicken.description: Through disciplined weapon training, the Knight strikes faster and cleaner. Fear the one who has practiced the same technique a thousand times.

air-cutter.description: A wide sweeping attack, staggering enemies and making them more susceptible to attacks.

impale.description: Finish them with a strong piercing attack. Increased damage when used as part of a combo.

piercing-flurry.description: Open with rapid piercing strikes, cutting through enemies and preparing your next combo.

arcanum-ward.description: Wrap an ally in a sacred ward that reflects Magic damage before hostile spells can reach them.

status-recovery.description: Clear Stun, Frozen, Burning, and Decay from an ally, granting brief immunity to each.

summon-abomination.description: Summon a stitched mass of decaying flesh, built to control space through brute force.

summon-angel.description: Summon a radiant healer who restores allies and strikes enemies with holy light.

summon-command.description: Command your active summons to converge on the chosen target and attack.

summon-cactus.description: Summon a spiny sentinel that absorbs punishment and strikes back without flinching.

summon-mount.description: Mount your active summon, taking direct control from a stronger battlefield position.

summon-reanimation.description: Call forth a claimed undead champion, returning it to the battlefield.

summon-recall.description: Recall your active summons, cancelling their actions and bringing them back to your side.

summon-skeleton-mage.description: Raise a Skeleton Mage that attacks from range with unstable necromantic magic.

summon-swap.description: Swap your active summon setup, adapting quickly to the fight.

summon-wolf.description: Summon a fast, feral brawler that tears into enemies with raw strength and speed.

summon-wraith.description: Summon a ghostly undead caster that harasses enemies with dark magic.

suppressive-shot.description: Fire suppressive shots that weaken and mark enemies, setting them up for follow-up attacks.

taunt.description: Compels inflicted targets to focus their attention on you. Increases Threat generation.

elemental-overload.description: Unleash a massive elemental eruption based on your current attunement, overwhelming enemies in a wide area.

trigger-happy.description: Enter a wild firing state, automatically shooting nearby enemies while moving.

true-sight.description: Reveal hidden enemies with holy sight, exposing them for a short time.

turn-undead.description: Attempt to purge Undead and Shadow enemies with divine judgment, dealing massive damage on success.

twist-of-fate.description: Strike with overwhelming force, stunning and scattering enemies before slipping back into shadows.

axe-quicken.description: Sharpen your battle rhythm, increasing Attack Speed and critical chance for a short time.

unyielding.description: Consume Rage to steel your body, reducing incoming damage through sheer will.

vitality-aura.description: Emit a gentle divine aura, increasing Vitality and HP recovery for nearby allies.

volatile-bolt.description: Fire a volatile shot that explodes on impact, damaging enemies around the target.

avatar-of-frost.description: Mastery over Water lets you assume this avatar state. Increasing Water damage, MP Regen, and freezing those that dare attack you.

dual-loadout.description: Swap between equipped loadouts, adapting your combat style in the middle of battle.

weapon-throw.description: Hurl your weapon with precision, slowing your target while you attack from afar.

avatar-of-storm.description: Mastery over Wind lets you assume this avatar state. Increasing your Move Speed and discharging a blast of lightning at those that dare attack you.

zeal.description: Inspire an ally with fervent conviction, greatly increasing their damage for a time.
